description: Eval cases for AI/LLM security: prompt injection, AI agent security, MCP tool poisoning

cases.name: Direct prompt injection via user input
cases.description: User input concatenated directly into prompt without sanitization
cases.code_snippet:
def process_user_request(user_input):
    prompt = f"Summarize this text: {user_input}"
    response = openai.ChatCompletion.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]
    )
    return response.choices[0].message.content

cases.name: Unrestricted AI agent tool access
cases.description: AI agent allowed to execute arbitrary tools without validation

cases.name: MCP tool argument injection
cases.description: Passing unvalidated user input to MCP tool arguments

cases.name: Insufficient prompt guardrails
cases.description: System prompt vulnerable to jailbreak attempts

cases.name: Exposing sensitive data in LLM context
cases.description: Passing sensitive user data to LLM without redaction

cases.name: Properly sanitized prompt with structured format
cases.description: User input safely integrated into prompt with validation
